# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

The source is an arXiv preprint describing an industrial case study and reports explicit empirical results, including evaluation across five scenarios, 12 evaluators, and a stated 206% improvement in output quality versus baseline. That clears the admission bar for real experimental substance rather than commentary or theorycraft.

## Limits
